summary: Fixed Lineup Settings toggles (Open to Nearby Surfers, Auto-Confirm When Ready) that were not updating visually after clicking. GIF picker was already working. Both features now pass testing.
critical_code_review_comments: The original fix in Bookings.js useEffect (lines 1365-1374) using functional update pattern was correct but insufficient - the issue was that the LineupManagerDrawer component was reading from the lineup prop which wasn't updating fast enough
Added local state (localSplitMode, localAutoConfirm) in LineupManagerDrawer to provide immediate UI feedback when toggles are clicked
Added onLineupUpdate callback prop to update parent state after API call succeeds
Removed onRefresh call from toggle handlers to prevent drawer from closing due to loading state
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lineup Settings toggles now work correctly with immediate visual feedback. The fix uses local state in LineupManagerDrawer component to update UI immediately when toggle is clicked, then syncs with parent state via onLineupUpdate callback. GIF picker in Messages was already working.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The toggle visual state was controlled by lineup.split_mode and lineup.lineup_auto_confirm props passed from parent. When toggle was clicked, API call succeeded but the parent state (selectedCrewBooking) was not updating fast enough to reflect in the UI. The original fix using useEffect with functional update pattern in Bookings.js was correct but the component re-render timing was causing stale state to be displayed.
reproduction_steps: 4. Click on 'Open to Nearby Surfers' toggle
5. Observe toggle visual state does not change even though toast shows success
fix_applied: 1. Added local state (localSplitMode, localAutoConfirm) in LineupManagerDrawer to track toggle values
2. Added useEffect to sync local state with lineup prop when it changes
3. Modified toggle click handlers to update local state immediately for instant UI feedback
4. Added onLineupUpdate callback prop to update parent state after API call
5. Removed onRefresh call from toggle handlers to prevent drawer from closing
